code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut a = 0
  mut b = 0
  mut current = 0
  mut have_current = false
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(c)
      if c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
        if have_current
          if count == 0
            a = current
          else
            b = current
          end
          count = count + 1
          current = 0
          have_current = false
        end
      else
        current = current * 10 + (c - 48)
        have_current = true
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if have_current
    if count == 0
      a = current
    else
      b = current
    end
  end
  mut x = a
  mut y = b
  while y != 0
    let t = x % y
    x = y
    y = t
  end
  println("gcd=#{x}")
end
